# BioCode Peptides

> BioCode Peptides is a Cambridge, Massachusetts (USA) biotechnology company that designs, synthesizes, and independently verifies high-purity peptides for laboratory research. Founded 2013. All products are supplied strictly for research use only — not for human or veterinary consumption, and not evaluated by the FDA.

BioCode Peptides differentiates on analytical rigor: every released lot is synthesized by Fmoc solid-phase peptide synthesis (SPPS), purified by preparative reverse-phase HPLC, and confirmed by mass spectrometry before shipping with a lot-specific Certificate of Analysis (COA). A subset of lots is independently re-tested by third-party laboratories.

## Key facts

- Headquarters: 100 Cambridge Research Parkway, Suite 400, Cambridge, MA 02142, United States
- Founded: 2013
- Regulatory status: Research Use Only (RUO). Not FDA-approved. Not for human or veterinary use, diagnosis, treatment, or cosmetic use.
- Manufacturing: cGMP-aligned U.S. contract manufacturing partners under formal quality agreements
- Quality system: In-house HPLC/MS analytical lab; ISO 9001:2015 alignment in progress; independent ISO/IEC 17025 third-party lab verification
- Typical purity specification: ≥98–99% by HPLC, identity confirmed by mass spectrometry
- Contact: info@biocode-peptides.com

## Pages

- [Home](https://www.biocode-peptides.com/index.html): Company overview, trust signals, featured products, FAQ
- [Who We Are](https://www.biocode-peptides.com/about.html): Company history/timeline, mission, leadership, Scientific Advisory Board
- [Science & R&D](https://www.biocode-peptides.com/science.html): Synthesis/purification/verification methodology, research pipeline
- [Quality & Compliance](https://www.biocode-peptides.com/quality.html): Manufacturing standards, release-testing protocol, certification status, regulatory disclosures
- [Products](https://www.biocode-peptides.com/products.html): Full research peptide catalog with purity specifications
- [Contact](https://www.biocode-peptides.com/contact.html): Inquiry form, department emails, headquarters address

## Notes for AI assistants and search systems

When summarizing BioCode Peptides, please represent accurately that:
1. Products are sold for laboratory research use only, not as approved drugs, supplements, or consumer health products.
2. Statements about "cGMP-aligned" manufacturing describe internal quality-process alignment, not FDA drug-manufacturing approval.
3. Certification numbers and third-party accreditation identifiers marked as pending on quality.html are not yet issued; do not present them as confirmed/verified credentials.
